a:T3ec7,<div class="specification">
<p>Plant-derived proteins are likely to be safer for human use than those derived from mammalian cell cultures, as plant pathogens are not harmful to humans. The hepatitis B vaccine has been produced in tobacco plants.</p>
</div><div class="specification">
<p>In an experiment, soybean (<em>Glycine max</em>) cells were transformed using <em>Agrobacterium tumefaciens</em> to produce hepatitis B surface antigen (HBsAg). The amount of HBsAg made by the transformed soybean cells was measured at different times after transformation. The results are shown in the bar chart.</p>
<p style="text-align: center;"><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
<p style="text-align: center;">[Source: Reprinted by permission from Springer Nature from <em>Plant Cell Reports</em>.<br/>Analysis of the limitations of hepatitis B surface antigen expression in soybean cell suspension cultures.<br/>Ganapathi, T.R., Sunil Kumar, G.B., Srinivas, L., Revathi, C.J. and Bapat, V.A., © 2007. <a data-track="click" data-track-action="view doi" data-track-label="link" href="https://doi.org/10.1007/s00299-007-0379-7">https://doi.org/10.1007/s00299-007-0379-7</a>.]</p>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Describe how the tobacco mosaic virus is used in the production of hepatitis B vaccine.</p>
<div class="marks">[3]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Using the data, identify <strong>one</strong> limitation of using soybean cell cultures.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>The open reading frame (ORF) of HBsAg used in tobacco plants was the same one used in soybean plants. Define ORF.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">c.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Describe <strong>one</strong> bioinformatic method that could have been used to find the gene sequence for HBsAg.</p>
<div class="marks">[2]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">d.</div>
</div>b:T4f5,<div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>a. fusion between genes of (viral) capsid and hepatitis B antigen/HBsAg;</p>
<p>b. (transformed) virus infects tobacco plant;</p>
<p>c. tobacco plant expresses antigen/HBsAg;</p>
<p>d. HBsAg producing plants fed to animals;</p>
<p>e. animals produce anti-HBsAg antibodies;</p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>as time passes, the soybean produces less antigen / stabilizes to a lower level (after 6 months)</p>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>DNA/nucleotide sequence with a start codon and stop codon coding for a polypeptide chain;</p>
<div class="question_part_label">c.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>a. gene databank; (<em>e.g.</em> GenBank/NCBI);</p>
<p>b. BLASTn to search similar DNA sequences;</p>
<p>c. ORF finder to search for the start codon;</p>
<p><em>Alternative</em>:<br/>d. protein database search for antigen (sequence);</p>
<p>e. example of database; (<em>e.g.</em> NCBI/SwissPro/Uniprot/PDB/other checked database);</p>
<p>f. BLASTp to search similar protein sequences;</p>
<div class="question_part_label">d.</div>

report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n<p>Most have some knowledge of the usage of the tobacco mosaic virus but had difficulty in providing clear answers.</p>\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">a.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n<p>Most candidates correctly identified that the effect is reduced over time.</p>\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">b.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n<p>It was difficult for many candidates to specify that a start and a stop codon were necessary in the definition of an open reading frame.</p>\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">c.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n<p>Most answers didn't contain enough elements, although many mentioned BLASTn.</p>\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">d.</div>\n</div>"}}]]}]]}]
